# MethodRegistry.TryGet method

Looks up a descriptor by method name (case-sensitive).

```csharp
public bool TryGet(string method, out MethodDescriptor? descriptor)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| method | The method name from the request. |
| descriptor | The matched descriptor, or `null` when the method is unknown. |

## Return Value

`true` when the method is registered.
